kilauea_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY STATUS REPORT
kilauea_notices.message: HVO Kilauea ORANGE/WATCH - Episode 48 of the ongoing Halemaʻumaʻu eruption at the summit of Kīlauea started at 4:40 a.m. HST on June 1. Tephra fall is reported within Hawaiʻi Volcanoes National Park and surrounding communities to the north.

mauna_loa_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY MONTHLY UPDATE
mauna_loa_notices.message: HVO Haleakala GREEN/NORMAL - No activity of concern for Haleakalā.
